name: Texas Tommy
recipeInstructions:
1. Split the hot dog down the center.
2. Place cheese inside the hot dog.
3. Wrap the hot dog and cheese in bacon, securing with a toothpick.
4. Carefully lower the wrapped hot dog into a deep fryer filled with oil.
5. Allow it to sink in the grease for a moment.
6. When the wrapped hot dog floats to the surface of the oil, remove it using tongs.
7. Place the fried hot dog on a plate or serving dish.
8. Serve with a roll and favorite garnishes.
